movie.actors: Adam Sandler, Jackie Sandler, Austin Stout, Kevin Nealon
movie.plot: Davey Stone, an alcoholic with a criminal record, is sentenced to community service under the supervision of an elderly referee. Davey is then faced with trying to reform and abandon his bad habits.
movie.title: Eight Crazy Nights
movie.writer: Brooks Arthur, Allen Covert, Brad Isaacs, Adam Sandler
